omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may share your personal information with our trusted third party partners for their own marketing purposes. We will only do this where you have given us your consent to do so. These third parties may include: Social media platforms such as Facebook, TikTok, Snapchat and Twitter to provide you with interest-based advertising on those platforms. Third party advertisers and advertising networks such as Google, to provide you with interest-based advertising.
